mapper.select: SELECT /* base.sy :: SyhUserTokenLog :: selectById */ l.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , usr.user_nm AS user_nm , cd_ta.code_label AS action_cd_nm , cd_tt.code_label AS token_type_cd_nm FROM syh_user_token_log l LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = l.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_user usr ON usr.user_id = l.user_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ta ON cd_ta.code_grp = 'TOKEN_ACTION' AND cd_ta.code_value = l.action_cd LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_tt ON cd_tt.code_grp = 'TOKEN_TYPE' AND cd_tt.code_value = l.token_type_cd WHERE l.log_id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) /* base.sy :: SyhUserTokenLog :: selectPageCount */ FROM syh_user_token_log l
